scripts.start-all: concurrently "start http://localhost:3000/dashboard.html" "node gateway.js" "node authority_manager.js" "cross-env ZONE=TOP_LEFT node simulator.js" "cross-env ZONE=TOP_RIGHT node simulator.js" "cross-env ZONE=BOTTOM_LEFT node simulator.js" "cross-env ZONE=BOTTOM_RIGHT node simulator.js"
scripts.start-sims-local: concurrently "cross-env ZONE=TOP_LEFT node simulator.js" "cross-env ZONE=TOP_RIGHT node simulator.js" "cross-env ZONE=BOTTOM_LEFT node simulator.js" "cross-env ZONE=BOTTOM_RIGHT node simulator.js"
